request_payload.exposure_text: As a fellow senior who remembers the Cold War, I worry about cutting defense spending. Remember when the power grid went down in '24? That wasn't just bad weather - experts say our enemies are testing our vulnerabilities. My grandson in the National Guard tells me they're stretched thin. We need to invest in modern defenses so we're not caught unprepared again. #NationalSecurityFirst #SupportOurTroops
